# FlowBoard Keyboard Shortcuts

## Overview

Keyboard shortcuts help you navigate FlowBoard without touching your mouse. Press `?` anywhere in the app to see the full shortcut list. All shortcuts work in the web app and on tablets with external keyboards.

## Navigation

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Cmd+K` / `Ctrl+K` | Open command palette (search anything) |
| `G` then `B` | Go to Board (Kanban) view |
| `G` then `T` | Go to Timeline view |
| `G` then `L` | Go to List view |
| `G` then `C` | Go to Calendar view |
| `G` then `P` | Go to Projects |
| `G` then `M` | Go to My Tasks |
| `G` then `S` | Go to Settings |
| `/` | Jump to search |
| `1` - `4` | Switch between views (Board, List, Timeline, Calendar) |

## Task Actions

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `C` or `N` | Create new task |
| `E` | Edit selected task |
| `Cmd+Enter` / `Ctrl+Enter` | Save task (when editing) |
| `Escape` | Close task detail or cancel editing |
| `D` | Set due date on selected task |
| `A` | Assign selected task |
| `P` | Change priority on selected task |
| `L` | Add label to selected task |
| `M` | Move task to another project |
| `Backspace` / `Delete` | Delete selected task (with confirmation) |
| `X` | Mark selected task complete |

## Board Navigation

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| Arrow keys | Navigate between tasks |
| `Enter` | Open selected task |
| `Space` | Quick-preview selected task (panel view) |
| `Tab` | Move to next column |
| `Shift+Tab` | Move to previous column |
| `Home` | Jump to first task in column |
| `End` | Jump to last task in column |

## Filtering & Views

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `F` | Open filter panel |
| `S` | Open sort options |
| `Cmd+Shift+F` / `Ctrl+Shift+F` | Clear all filters |
| `Z` | Toggle zoom level (Timeline view) |
| `H` | Toggle completed tasks visibility |

## General

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `?` | Show keyboard shortcuts help |
| `Cmd+Z` / `Ctrl+Z` | Undo last action |
| `Cmd+Shift+Z` / `Ctrl+Shift+Z` | Redo |
| `.` | Open notifications panel |
| `Cmd+,` / `Ctrl+,` | Open Settings |

## Customizing Shortcuts

Pro and Enterprise users can customize keyboard shortcuts:

1. Go to **Settings > Keyboard Shortcuts**
2. Click any shortcut to reassign it
3. Press your preferred key combination
4. Click **"Save"**

Custom shortcuts sync across devices. Reset to defaults anytime from the same settings page.

**Conflict detection:** If your new shortcut conflicts with an existing one, FlowBoard warns you and asks which to keep.
